mechanism: platform-*.yml owns trigger conditions and gating. template-*.yml owns execution. The trigger calls the template via workflow_call with managementGroupHierarchy as the routing input.
why: Mixing gating with execution couples when-to-deploy to how-to-deploy — reuse across test/prod requires duplication.

related.note: Gating lives in the trigger layer only.
Each capability has its own trigger+template pair.

violations: Template workflow containing branch or event gating.
Trigger workflow containing az or gh execution calls.
